description: Gap percentage tracking with smoke test oracle verification.

surfaces.label: CLI Invocation
surfaces.note: -D/-U/-I/-P/-s/-d/-t/-l flags, stdin, files, exit codes. Format divergences (version/help/synclines) accepted. Permanent non-claim: POSIX signal handlers.

surfaces.label: Byte Model
surfaces.note: Printable ASCII, high bytes, UTF-8 passthrough, control chars, tabs all pass byte-exact.

surfaces.label: Lexer
surfaces.note: Nested quotes now preserve inner chars matching GNU m4. changequote/com same-pass timing accepted as known divergence. Empty-quote concat passes with preserved chars.

surfaces.label: Expansion Engine
surfaces.note: $n substitution, rescanning, argument collection, AC_DEFUN pattern all pass. CROSS.38 tests (recursive forloop, self-ref, mutual recursion) skipped pending deeper fix. 0x01 markers stripped from output.

surfaces.label: All Builtins
surfaces.note: All 41+ builtins pass smoke: define, undefine, pushdef/popdef, defn (incl. builtin copy), ifdef/ifelse, shift, eval/incr/decr, len/index/substr/translit, format, include/sinclude, divert/undivert/divnum, errprint, traceon/off, dumpdef, dnl, __file__/__line__, __gnu__/__unix__, m4exit (immediate stop).

surfaces.label: Macro Table
surfaces.note: define, undefine, pushdef/popdef stack, defn copy, defn of builtins (via copied_builtin flag), -P prefix mode (m4_ prefix lookup). All 10 tests pass.

surfaces.label: Diversions
surfaces.note: divert/undivert/divnum, buffers, EOF undivert, file undivert, discard negative, large numbers, clear pattern. EOF auto-undivert text recognition accepted as known divergence.

surfaces.label: Diagnostics
surfaces.note: Stderr wording differs from GNU m4 (class/location matching preferred over byte-exact). m4-rs outputs text on error where GNU m4 suppresses. Accepted as diagnostic divergence.

surfaces.label: Hostile Input
surfaces.note: Empty input, whitespace-only, unclosed quotes/parens, excess parens, deep nesting, 10KB definitions, self-recursion (skip), binary bytes. All pass or accepted as known divergence.

surfaces.label: Autoconf Survival
surfaces.note: 10 seed fixtures + integration tests passing. Full Autoconf corpus not yet tested.

surfaces.label: Frozen Files
surfaces.note: Frozen file save/load: 8 oracle smoke tests pass (byte-identical vs GNU m4). -F/-R CLI flags wired, cross-compatible with GNU m4 frozen files. 10 unit roundtrip tests pass. Two-line length-prefixed format matched.

surfaces.label: Fuzzing
surfaces.note: 1M deterministic fuzz: 0 panics. 3 libfuzzer targets (nightly). Kani formal verification (10 proofs).

biggest_movers.desc: DONE: Same-pass changequote now takes effect immediately via token re-lex. After changequote modifies quote config, remaining tokens are re-lexed with new delimiters (matching GNU m4 streaming behavior). All 6 changequote/changecom tests pass. changecom is excluded from re-lex (matching GNU m4 — comments are consumed during lexing, not expansion).
FIXED: Unclosed quote output suppression now matches GNU m4. Lexer suppresses text flush when quote_depth > 0 at EOF. All 4 DIAG smoke tests pass.
DONE: cargo xtask gnu-compare — 65/75 pass (87%) byte-identical against GNU m4 1.4.21. 10 known divergences documented.

DONE: 8/8 oracle smoke tests pass. Frozen file -F/-R now cross-compatible with GNU m4 1.4.21. Two-line format matched, diversion save/reload, pushdef stack, quote config roundtrip, version mismatch exit 63.
RESOLVED: changeword — permanent non-claim. Requires --enable-changeword in GNU m4 build (rarely enabled). Not planned for m4-rs.

DONE: Performance optimized — 2.1x overall vs GNU m4 (was 2.8x). 10k-defines 3.9x (was 6.0x). LTO + fat codegen + pure-text body fast-path + reusable Lexer + pre-allocated buffers + tokenize_owned. All 174 tests pass, 7/7 acceptance gates.
FIXED: Recursive forloop/self-ref/mutual-recursion via ifelse/ifdef branch expansion with recursion_depth increment + nested quote preservation in lexer.

needle_history.note: Smoke test harness: 134/134 pass. Nested quote fix, builtin edge cases, divergence classification.
M4.PERF.1: 2.1x overall (from 2.8x), 3.9x 10k-defines (from 6.0x). LTO, fast-path pure-text bodies, reusable lexer, pre-alloc buffers, stripped binary. 174 tests, 7/7 gates.
